compatibility_policy.format: Additive-only evolution: new artifacts may be added, existing paths are stable
compatibility_policy.schema_versions: Each artifact tracks its own schema_version independently
compatibility_policy.integrity: SHA256 checksums computed at validation time; dossier is revalidatable offline

entries.title: Cross-cutting: Architecture heterogeneity (aarch64/x86_64/RISC-V)
entries.close_reason: Architecture heterogeneity artifacts are present and verified: rch cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane --test sos_barrier_arch_independence_test passed 6/6.

entries.title: REVIEW: [HIGH] locale_abi.rs setlocale/newlocale/textdomain/bindtextdomain walk unbounded memory via CStr::from_ptr on user-controlled pointers
entries.close_reason: All four named sites (setlocale L158, textdomain L392, bindtextdomain L419+L435, newlocale L491) now use read_bounded_cstr (locale_abi.rs:36) which delegates to scan_c_string + known_locale_string_re…

entries.title: [MODE-1][HIGH] symbolic correctness: c11threads create/join backend mismatch
entries.close_reason: Already fixed: commit 138c07c3 made pthread_join delegate to host for non-managed handles. 37/37 c11threads_abi_test pass. Verified round 2.

entries.title: REVIEW: [HIGH] iconv() TOCTOU use-after-free with concurrent iconv_close()
entries.close_reason: Fixed: commit c8003957 (peer agent) refactored iconv registry to Arc<Mutex<IconvDescriptor>>; concurrent close + iconv no longer UAFs. 41/41 iconv tests pass including the new TOCTOU regression.

entries.title: REVIEW: [HIGH] pthread_cond_wait/timedwait clobbers RECURSIVE/ERRORCHECK mutex owner without ownership check
entries.close_reason: Fixed: commit 64fb99b2 added owner verification in pthread_cond_wait/timedwait for RECURSIVE/ERRORCHECK; returns EPERM for non-owner. Regression test added.

entries.title: stdio: implement tmpfile/tmpfile64 natively via O_TMPFILE + native fdopen
entries.close_reason: Already implemented: tmpfile uses O_TMPFILE primary + mkstemp/unlink fallback + fdopen_native_impl; tmpfile64 alias. 6/6 stdio tmpfile tests pass.

entries.title: stdio: define versioned JSONL evidence schema + parser + ring buffer
entries.close_reason: Stdio evidence schema/parser/ring buffer are implemented and verified: rch cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test stdio_evidence_schema passed 4/4.

entries.title: [MODE-5][HIGH] symbolic correctness: runtime_policy env lock poisoning hides root failures
entries.close_reason: Runtime policy switch logging and panic-isolated env lock recovery are present; revalidated runtime_policy regression via rch.

release_notes_hook.release_notes_markdown:
## Release Notes Candidates

- `bd-10pq` Cross-cutting: Architecture heterogeneity (aarch64/x86_64/RISC-V) (task, closed 2026-04-24T03:39:34.405902286Z)
  Architecture heterogeneity artifacts are present and verified: rch cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane --test sos_barrier_arch_independence_test passed 6/6.
- `bd-z4k96` REVIEW: [HIGH] locale_abi.rs setlocale/newlocale/textdomain/bindtextdomain walk unbounded memory via CStr::from_ptr on user-controlled pointers (bug, closed 2026-04-24T03:35:00.000000000Z)
  All four named sites (setlocale L158, textdomain L392, bindtextdomain L419+L435, newlocale L491) now use read_bounded_cstr (locale_abi.rs:36) which delegates to scan_c_string + known_locale_string_re…
- `bd-jqy64` [MODE-1][HIGH] symbolic correctness: c11threads create/join backend mismatch (bug, closed 2026-04-24T03:30:00Z)
  Already fixed: commit 138c07c3 made pthread_join delegate to host for non-managed handles. 37/37 c11threads_abi_test pass. Verified round 2.
- `bd-ily44` REVIEW: [HIGH] iconv() TOCTOU use-after-free with concurrent iconv_close() (bug, closed 2026-04-24T03:30:00Z)
  Fixed: commit c8003957 (peer agent) refactored iconv registry to Arc<Mutex<IconvDescriptor>>; concurrent close + iconv no longer UAFs. 41/41 iconv tests pass including the new TOCTOU regression.
- `bd-cie59` REVIEW: [HIGH] pthread_cond_wait/timedwait clobbers RECURSIVE/ERRORCHECK mutex owner without ownership check (bug, closed 2026-04-24T03:30:00Z)
  Fixed: commit 64fb99b2 added owner verification in pthread_cond_wait/timedwait for RECURSIVE/ERRORCHECK; returns EPERM for non-owner. Regression test added.
- `bd-9chy.7` stdio: implement tmpfile/tmpfile64 natively via O_TMPFILE + native fdopen (feature, closed 2026-04-24T03:30:00Z)
  Already implemented: tmpfile uses O_TMPFILE primary + mkstemp/unlink fallback + fdopen_native_impl; tmpfile64 alias. 6/6 stdio tmpfile tests pass.
- `bd-9chy.4` stdio: define versioned JSONL evidence schema + parser + ring buffer (feature, closed 2026-04-24T03:20:58.472918221Z)
  Stdio evidence schema/parser/ring buffer are implemented and verified: rch cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test stdio_evidence_schema passed 4/4.
- `bd-4rjgy` [MODE-5][HIGH] symbolic correctness: runtime_policy env lock poisoning hides root failures (bug, closed 2026-04-24T03:17:39.092744577Z)
  Runtime policy switch logging and panic-isolated env lock recovery are present; revalidated runtime_policy regression via rch.
